title: Amtech N2415 PVC Pond and Drain Gloves XL (Size 10), Long and Certified Quality for Protective Maintenance Tasks, Blue
features: The Amtech pond and drain gloves are ideal for pond, drain and sewer maintenance, as well as other similar tasks.
These extra large size gauntlet gloves feature a long elasticated 50cm sleeve for added ingress protection.
The Amtech N2415 protective gloves are officially size 10, and benefit from a cotton interlocked lining for comfort and have a waterproof textured grip.

Please note that these protective PVC pond and drain work gloves are CE Complaint, indicating that they conform with health, safety, and environmental protection standards for products sold within the European Economic Area (EEA).
description: The Amtech pond and drain PVC gloves are of a certified quality, meaning that they meet EU standards for health, safety, and environmental protection. These PVC work gloves are ideal for pond, drain and sewer maintenance, as well as other similar tasks. Benefits from long elasticated sleeves for protection and interlocked cotton lining for comfort. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your safety & workwear requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products.
